title: cephalanthera pusilla
intro: Cephalanthera pusilla, also known as the frog orchid, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the orchid family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. Cephalanthera pusilla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
